song.title: Enough
song.author: Chris Tomlin
song.presentation: C V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C D G/B C You are my supply, |my breath of life, . Am7 D2/F# Still more awesome than I know. .G C D G/B C You are my reward, |worth living for, . Am7 D2/F# Still more awesome than I know.
[C] . G C D C All of You is more than enough for . G C D C G All of me |for every thirst and every need. .C D C B You satisfy me with Your love . C D C G C D C G And all I have in You is more than enough.
[V2] You’re my sacrifice of greatest price, Still more awesome than I know. You’re my coming King. You are everything, Still more awesome than I know.
[B] .G C D More than all I want, . C G/B C More than all I need. . D C You are more than enough for me, .G C D More than all I know, . C G/B C More than all I can see. . D C You are more than enough.
